Liturgical recitations and mystical hymns designed to facilitate visionary experience10.

Details
The soul contemplates and ascends through the ten sefirot, each representing a divine attribute10.
Ascent through the four spiritual worlds: Assiyah, Yetzirah, Beriah, Atzilut10.
The soul’s mystical journey toward union with the Divine, guided by Torah and mitzvot10.
Culmination in devekut (cleaving to God) and the mystical experience of the Shekhinah10.
